_comment: Vultr Firewall Group for Avender Cluster + Tenant VMs. Apply this group to the cluster control plane VM and all tenant VMs.

rules._comment: SSH access from bastion/jump host only (optional — remove if using Vultr console)
SysAdmin API + Whisper Proxy — internal VPC only
Tenant Agent Zero WebUI — internal VPC only

outbound_rules._comment: Allow all outbound (Docker pull, apt, etc.)

setup_instructions: 1. Create VPC in Vultr dashboard (or via API). Note the VPC ID and CIDR block.
2. Create this firewall group in Vultr dashboard (or via API). Note the group ID.
3. Replace BASTION_IP with your jump host IP, or remove the SSH rule.
4. Replace VPC_CIDR with your actual VPC CIDR (e.g. 10.240.0.0/16).
5. Attach the firewall group to the cluster control plane VM.
6. The VULTR_FIREWALL_GROUP_ID env var in docker-compose.yml is used to auto-attach tenant VMs.
7. The VULTR_VPC_ID env var is passed to the Vultr instance creation API.
